description: AWS Price List provides machine-readable catalogs of AWS service and product pricing. It supports querying pricing metadata and products through AWS APIs and downloading bulk JSON or CSV price list files.
summary: pricing.us-east-1.amazonaws.com exposes AWS Price List bulk download files publicly, while the related AWS Price List query/control API is reached at `api.pricing.us-east-1.amazonaws.com` and authenticated with AWS SigV4; AWS CLI `pricing` commands target the same service with AWS credentials.

packages.runtimeHint: AWS CLI v2 installer / package; command is `aws`
